mapper.select: SELECT id, name, department, title, phone, email FROM doctors ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, name, department, title, phone, email FROM doctors
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{department}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctors (name, department, title, phone, email) VALUES (#{name}, #{department}, #{title}, #{phone}, #{email})
mapper.update: UPDATE doctors SET name = #{name}, department = #{department}, title = #{title}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email} WHERE id = #{id}
